title: Mahendra's Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Mahendra's Institute is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Visakhapatnam location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!
